description: Create a View inside a Locus View package workspace. By default it writes under the selected Unity project at Locus/View/<project-name>/<view-id>, with shared package code under Locus/View/<project-name>/src. Set packageName to create or reuse another package workspace. Set displayPath to choose the user-visible tree path; this is stored in view.json and does not move the packageRoot. Set temporary=true for one-off display Views; Locus writes them under the app temp directory, appends a unique suffix to the requested id, keeps them out of the user-visible View registry, and returns the actual id plus packageRoot. Use this only inside the /view workflow. Use normal file tools to read or edit files inside packageRoot.

id.description: Lowercase kebab-case View id, for example material-inspector.

packageName.description: Optional View package workspace folder name under Locus/View. Defaults to the Unity project folder name.

name.description: Display name for the View. Defaults to a title generated from id.

template.description: Built-in View template to copy. Supported values: blank, inspector-form, canvas-board, field-blocks, node-graph, link-board, serialized-table.

icon.description: Optional Locus icon library name for the View list. Defaults by template.

displayPath.description: Optional user-visible View tree path stored in view.json, for example Tools/material-inspector. The physical packageRoot stays unchanged.

temporary.description: Create a one-off View outside Locus/View. Temporary Views can be opened with the returned id but do not appear in view_list or the user-visible View tree.
